Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Matthew B. Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Samuel Williams, who was not present.
No appearance by defendant Waldron Duffy, Inc.
Default entered against defendant Waldron Duffy, Inc. - 03/11/05.
Order granting waiver of witness testimony at prove-up hearing - 02/26/08.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Samuel Williams and against the Defaulted Defendant Waldron Duffy, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal $347,000.00, plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined by the Court.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
